Off Calendar Oct-14-2024 Continued To Dec-02-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Transfer Of Property To Estate
Off Calendar Jun-25-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Thomas Wrobel appeared by zoom for and with Elaine Brett by zoom.
Dennis Rolstad appeared by zoom for Security Benefit Life Insurance Company.

Mr. Wrobel confirmed that his theory is that Diane had a trust and then revoked it because no one could find a copy of it anymore. The court noted that a diligent search of the residence was done, and asked if anyone has contacted Craig Hawkins from Coreink Financial, how title of the property was held and when it was obtained. Mr. Wrobel stated that no one has contacted Craig, that the real property is in the decedent's name individually, that it was obtained in 1982 and that the property was never transferred to any trust. Mrs. Brett stated that is the first time she has heard of Mr. Hawkins. Discussion was held regarding the release and discharge of Mr. Rolstad's client. The Petition for Transfer of Property to Estate is under submission.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Pliego. Not reported.
